artifacts.summary: Analysis of forward_F witness placement blocker with recommendation for multi-family W/D separation approach

partial_progress.details: Research report analyzing forward_F blocker completed. Recommends multi-family BFMCS with W/D separation using existing proven canonicalMCS_forward_F infrastructure.

findings_summary.blocker_diagnosis: forward_F witnesses from canonical_forward_F may not be CanonicalR-reachable from root MCS, hence not in TimelineQuot
findings_summary.recommended_approach: Multi-family BFMCS with W/D separation - D=TimelineQuot for order, W=CanonicalMCS for witnesses
findings_summary.key_insight: Witnesses don't need to be in D (time domain), they need to be in W (world state space)
findings_summary.existing_infrastructure: canonicalMCS_forward_F and canonicalMCS_backward_P in CanonicalFMCS.lean are fully proven
alternatives_considered: Direct semantic proof (20h, too much restructuring)
findings_summary.zero_debt_compliance: Yes - uses existing proven theorems, no new sorries or axioms
